title: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod: V-Sides Soundtrack
description: Overrides the CWSM's default soundtrack with a fully custom UST written by a friend.
body:
![CWSM: V-Sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30b62acab7a3933953e7f112b7ea0019a0ffd6b9.png)

![By: Vertigo & The Exiled Fellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf801a8621ad1dfafb9b3c752f15b67273b63b65.webp)

# NOTICE: Only versions 1.20.1 and above will be kept up to date.

## **ABOUT**
This mod serves as an add-on and incorporates its very own soundtrack to Cracker's Wither Storm Mod, overriding the mod's default music with custom tracks written by the artist, Vertigo.
 
**Important note: Like CWSM's default music, the volume of all tracks added by the mod can be adjusted via the _"Jukebox/Note Blocks"_ slider in _Options > "Music & Sounds"_ in the menu.**

**CONFIG FOLDER: config/CWSM V-Sides; Common.toml**

**Things that can be configured:**

- Toggling any track in the mod from playing (includes an option where you get to disable the entire soundtrack)
- Whether music subtitles are active by default
- Whether the Withered Radio drops from the Wither Storm
- Disabling the message that shows up every time you enter a world for the first time

### Exclusive music will play when the following conditions are met (by order of when they typically are going to be):

• A Wither Storm (Phase 1-3) is within 100 blocks in proximity of the player, _stops playing if the player goes 14 blocks below the surface_

• A Wither Storm (Phase 4-5) is within 230 blocks in proximity of the player, _stops playing if the player goes 14 blocks below the surface_

• A Withered Symbiont is within 69 blocks in proximity of the player

• A knocked out Wither Storm is within 88 blocks in proximity of the player (and additionally when resurrected)

• A Wither Storm (Phase 6-7) is within 350 blocks in proximity of the player, _stops playing if the player goes 14 blocks below the surface_

• The player is in the bowels

• The fight with the Command Block is initiated, 3 unique tracks for each phase

• The Wither Storm is ultimately vanquished from the world

### **The Withered Radio**
- Obtained upon the defeat of a Wither Storm, allows the player to listen to all tracks played during the storm's active rampage at will as well as unused/exclusive (versions of) tracks that would've otherwise not been heard in default survival gameplay.

<details>
<summary>Additional features included in the mod:</summary>

•  Depending on whichever song is currently being played, a message will appear by the player's action bar for a brief moment specifying the current track being played at the exact moment.
**The player can enter the command sequence /cwsmvsides.enable.subtitles (true/false) to toggle this feature as they see fit!**
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/075adfb35fc91b9de33c5c4f7bd03ba93f9c9951.png)


•  The soundtrack can be toggled at any time via /cwsmvsides.enable (true/false)
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd2196cb6a65c7fa795f3ace69bdf2eea7ef623c.png)

(Note: A message will pop-up every time the player enters a world for the first time stating exactly this.)

</details>



<details>
<summary>"Music only plays at boss spawn"</summary>

You probably had Dynamic Surroundings installed. Don't worry, there isn't a need to get rid of the mod. Instead, follow these steps to completely solve the issue while still having Dynamic Surroundings installed.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T0fpHUYm9zE_luBFx0mNjUFQxZxxc6drXSR_lBbBJCc/edit?usp=sharing

</details>
